overview.description: Test for variations with all types of integrations
overview.name: Variations test

web.comment: Start WEB scripts for condition with url var

var.comment: Check ability to fetch URL of current page and create variable with it
var.name: url

condition.comment: Create condition for check correct work of var 'url'
condition.name: remote

condition.comment: Create condition for check correct work of var 'url'
condition.name: local

repeat.comment: Check the ability to run variations in repeat

wait.comment: Wait for loading new page 1 second
Wait for loading new page 1 second

image.comment: Check that input fields correspond to data from the variation file
Check that input fields correspond to data from the variation file

mysql.comment: Check ability to make INSERT query into the DB

repeat.comment: Check the ability to run variations in repeat

mysql.comment: Check ability to get list of news

redis.comment: Check ability to add single key-value pair to redis using SET command and get key-value pair using GET command

http.comment: Check ability to get news by name with updated name

repeat.comment: Check the ability to run variations in repeat

http.comment: Check ability to get news by name with updated name

migrate.comment: Migrate list of registered users from patch to 'users' table

auth.comment: Check ability to log in by 'auth' command

http.comment: Check ability to get list of all users by authorized user inside 'auth' command
Check ability to add new user inside auth command
Check ability to get list of all users by authorized user inside 'auth' command
